content.en:
Ye Tian brought several gods of the human race and a number of earth lords to the Cangyu Universe.

The Phantom Feather God chose the place of transcendence in the Phantom Mountain, which is one of the residences of the Phantom Feather God General, and it is also a treasure land.

Now, a large number of gods and earth lords have come to the vicinity of the Phantom Mountain.

this day.

The Phantom Feather God will appear, dressed in a Supreme Treasure, holding a Powerful Supreme Treasure spear, and showing a resolute Supreme Will on his body.

"Today, my phantom feather will transcend the catastrophe, if it succeeds, I am the true monarch of the destiny, if not, then I will die here!"

The voice of the Phantom Feather Divine General was heard all around.

"The Phantom Feather God will be considered too unlucky!"

Long Ze Divine General sighed.

The other god generals nodded one after another, if it was according to the previous fusion speed, the Phantom Feather God would be able to cultivate in the Cangyu Universe for another 9 million years, how could it be improved to the combat power of the four-star god generals.

With a four-star god will be detached, it is absolutely easy to detach.

Now, the Phantom Feather God will be at the peak of the three-star god general, and no one knows whether he can transcend it.

They don't know the specific situation of detachment, they only know that the three-star god general level anti-heaven is qualified for detachment, but they may not be able to transcendence.

But a small number of generals such as Long Ze Divine General are very clear that if they want to transcend, they must have four-star divine generals.

There is a big gap between the three-star peak god general and the four-star god general, and it is almost impossible to succeed in the tribulation.

Soon, the Phantom Feather God will begin to detach.

Detachment is to take out the soul imprint in the long river of time and space, which requires the power corresponding to the long river of time and space and the fight against the origin of the universe, this step can be barely done with only three star gods.

"The long river of time and space, now!"

Bang!!!

A vast river of time and space manifested, mighty and mighty, attracting the attention of countless strong people.

At this time, the Phantom Feather God General's big hands stepped into the long river of time and space, pushing away countless space-time forces.

The power of the Origin of the Universe is also suppressing the Phantom Feather Divine General, but there is no way to stop the Phantom Feather Divine General.

Finally, the power of the Phantom Feather Divine General extended to the depths of the long river of time and space, and captured the soul imprint belonging to the Phantom Feather Divine General.

In an instant, the soul mark of the Phantom Feather God General turned into a giant, constantly stepping on the river of time and space, and crossing time and space towards the body of the Phantom Feather God General.

Step by step, it pushes horizontally, as if the long river of time and space is an ordinary river.

Such a power far beyond the ordinary three-star god generals made many of the god generals present tremble slightly.

The Phantom Feather God General is very strong, and he deserves to be the second place on the God General List.

I have to say that the gods and generals present were very convinced by the strength of the phantom feather generals, but they were convinced, so they felt a pity.

If the Phantom Feather God will really fall, it will definitely be a big pity for the Cangyu Universe!

It didn't take long for the soul imprint of the Phantom Feather Divine General to successfully walk out of the long river of time and space and merge with the main body.

At this moment, a sense of perfection was transmitted.

The soul imprint of the long river of time and space is the real imprint, if it does not transcend time and space, then it will naturally never be able to get rid of the limitations of the universe.

At this moment, the soul imprint returns, and this is the true perfect body.

Although Ye Tian's current body is far stronger than that of the Phantom Feather God General, Ye Tian's body is not a perfect body, because the soul is not perfect, and the soul imprint is still under the control of the universe origin.

Bang!!!!

The thunder cloud appeared, covering the entire Illusory Mountain, and even spreading to the surrounding area.

The people around the audience kept retreating, away from this area, otherwise they would be targeted by the thunder clouds, and with their strength, they would definitely die!

Rumble!

The first thunder tribulation came, and it slammed into the Phantom Feather Divine General.

The Phantom Feather God didn't move his body, and he easily survived the first thunder tribulation.

There are a total of 27 thunder tribulations in the tribulation of the transcendent, and the first 24 thunder tribulations are not too terrifying, and the three-star god generals can easily get through it, but the last three thunder tribulations are extremely terrifying, and each of them is enough to easily kill the three-star god generals.

The second thunderstorm has come!

The third thunderstorm is coming!

......

Thunder Tribulation continued to bombard the Phantom Feather Divine General, and the terrifying rules of thunder permeated all around.

Instead, some Earth Venerables regarded this Transcendental Tribulation as an opportunity and were exploring the Great Dao of Thunder.

I have to say that it is indeed of great benefit to them to observe this transcendent tribulation, but if they want to gain something in such a short period of time, they can't do it without a certain understanding.

Time passed little by little, and the Phantom Feather God General also survived the thunder tribulation again and again.

The 24th Thunder Tribulation has finally arrived, and the Phantom Feather God General has supported the Divine Power of Defense, and it has consumed part of his strength to survive the 24th Thunder Tribulation.

Although these 24 thunder tribulations did not hurt the Phantom Feather God General, they also consumed a lot of the Phantom Feather God General's strength, and damaged some of the Phantom Feather God General's body protection treasures.

Finally, the 25th Thunderstorm came.

I saw that the power of the 25th Thunder Tribulation turned into an ancient Chaos God and Demon, and unleashed a terrifying Thunder Dao Great Divine Power, blasting towards the Phantom Feather God General.

The Phantom Feather God's expression changed slightly, no longer hiding his strength, and faced this Chaos God and Demon with a full attitude.

"Kill!"

The Phantom Feather God will fight hard with the spear in hand.

Bang!!!!

The void seemed to be shattered, countless earth lords trembled all over, vomiting blood uncontrollably, and the divine generals also protected some of the divine generals to retreat, lest they be affected.

A Nine-Star Earth Venerable was shocked while vomiting blood: "The 25th Thunder Tribulation is so terrifying, the aftermath alone almost shattered my divine body!"

Some scattered cultivators of two or three star earth venerables were too weak, and there was no one to support them, so they were directly shocked and killed by the aftermath of the thunder tribulation.

This scene frightened many earth venerables to retreat far away, and they didn't dare to get any closer.

"The Phantom Feather God will survive the 25th Thunder Tribulation!"

A god will say.

When everyone looked over, they saw that the Divine Spear of the Phantom Feather Divine General had dimmed, and a piece of Supreme Treasure armor on his body was also in a half-shattered state.

In the next moment, the half-shattered armor disappeared, and a new set of Supreme Treasure armor appeared, and the divine spear in his hand also turned into a Supreme Treasure spear.

It can be seen that the Phantom Feather God General has also prepared a lot of supreme treasures in order to survive the tribulation.

After waiting for a while, the 26th Thunder Tribulation appeared.

This time.

The Phantom Feather God General took out a jade talisman, activated the jade talisman, opened the layers of defense formations of the Phantom Mountain, and took out some talismans, these are powerful talismans from the chaos, and they are specially used to defend against the power of thunder tribulation, and the effect is very good.

However, the 26th Thunder Tribulation came, and those defensive formations had little effect at all.

Under normal circumstances, to overcome the tribulation of the transcendent, external objects are not of much help, and the power of the thunder tribulation ignores other defenses to a certain extent, so the defensive formation is not very useful.

But even so, it can still be activated a little use, as long as there is a weakening effect, even if it costs a lot, the Phantom Feather God will not hesitate.

The defensive formation was torn apart, the defensive charm was shattered, and the thunderous blow of the Chaos God and Demon came towards the Phantom Feather God General.

In an instant, the Illusory Feather Divine General's defensive supreme treasure was penetrated, and the body of the Phantom Feather Divine General was also penetrated and shattered.

But at this moment, a space shattered, and another Phantom Feather God appeared, still pierced by a blow.

Then, one phantom feather god after another will appear, but under the blow of the chaos gods and demons transformed by the thunder tribulation, through time and space, how many phantom feather gods will not be able to stop it, and all of them will be killed.

In the end, the Phantom Feather God will be penetrated through his body, half-kneeling in the starry sky, his breath is extremely weak, and a drop of divine blood will flow only on the Illusory Mountain, dyeing the Illusory Mountain red.
